title: Sports, Olympics, and Achievement Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A way of explaining something by comparing it to something else that is similar.
choices: analogy
bias
viewpoint
rounds.answer: analogy
rounds.explanation: analogy: A way of explaining something by comparing it to something else that is similar.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A group of words that someone has said or written, repeated by another.
choices: analogy
bias
quotation
rounds.answer: quotation
rounds.explanation: quotation: A group of words that someone has said or written, repeated by another.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A different choice or option.
choices: bias
alternative
analogy
rounds.answer: alternative
rounds.explanation: alternative: A different choice or option.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: The detective found evidence that showed who took the missing money.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: A group of words that someone has said or written, repeated by another.
A short part taken from a longer piece of writing.

The most exciting or important part of a story or event.
rounds.answer: The most exciting or important part of a story or event.
rounds.explanation: The climax of the match was when the striker scored in the last minute.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: The Olympic Games should be held in the same city every time.
How did you first become interested in your sport?
Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Our school celebrates diversity by welcoming students from many cultures.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: If you do not like football, basketball is a good alternative.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: With such strong preparation, their victory seemed inevitable.
